name: domain-whois-marketplace
description: Domain WHOIS/RDAP lookups + project-name finder for Claude Code — native protocols, IANA discovery, bulk availability checking, skills, slash commands, agent, and hooks.

plugins.name: domain-whois-mcp
plugins.description: Full Claude Code plugin for domain research and project naming. 8 MCP tools (whois_lookup, rdap_lookup, domain_check, bulk_domain_check, tld_info, whois_raw, find_whois_server, rdap_bootstrap_info), 4 skills (domain-lookup, project-name-finder, domain-monitor, tld-advisor), 4 slash commands (/check-domain, /find-name, /domain-info, /tld), 1 agent (domain-strategist), and 2 hooks that auto-suggest availability checks when starting a new project. Zero API keys.
